title: Workout timer freezes
body: Since version 4.2.0 the workout timer freezes halfway through a session and I lose the whole log.
author: offline-user-001

title: Subscription wall is confusing
body: I cannot tell which workouts are free anymore. The subscription screen appears before I understand the value.
author: offline-user-002

title: Great guided sessions
body: The guided sessions are clear and motivating. I like the new beginner plans.
author: offline-user-003

title: Hard to read during workouts
body: The timer and next exercise text are too small when my phone is on the floor during a workout.
author: offline-user-004

title: Watch sync is unreliable
body: Apple Watch sync misses completed workouts, so my weekly progress is wrong.
author: offline-user-005

title: Timer stops on lock screen
body: If the screen locks, the workout timer stops and the rest timer never alerts me.
author: offline-user-006

title: Trial details need clarity
body: The trial page does not explain renewal timing clearly, so I cancelled before starting.
author: offline-user-007

title: Reinstall helped
body: Version 4.2.0 crashed once, but reinstalling fixed it and the workouts run fine now.
author: offline-user-008

title: Timer stops on lock screen
body: If the screen locks, the workout timer stops and the rest timer never alerts me.
author: offline-user-006
